_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Sandbox (S&Box) Server
author: team@gameforge.gg
description: S&Box dedicated server using a custom runtime image with baked Wine + Windows .NET.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euoo pipefail

mkdir -p /mnt/server /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /tmp
rm -f steamcmd.tar.gz
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd --no-same-owner
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
chown -R root:root /mnt || true
export HOME=/mnt/server

./steamcmd.sh +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

echo "\n-----------------------------------"
echo "SteamCMD installation complete..."
echo "-----------------------------------"

variables.name: Game
variables.description: Primary game package passed to +game (for example: facepunch.walker).

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Public server name shown in the S&Box server browser and listings.

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Optional map/package identifier loaded after +game. Leave blank to use the game default (for example: facepunch.flatgrass).

variables.name: Local Project (.sbproj)
variables.description: Optional local .sbproj target for +game. File must exist under /home/container/projects/; enter only relative folder/file (for example: richman/richman.sbproj).

variables.name: Extra Args
variables.description: Optional extra launch arguments appended to sbox-server.exe, some gamemodes may require additional arguments to function properly. Use with caution.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Query port for server discovery and status queries (UDP). Pterodactyl automatically assigns this as a second port allocation - the first allocation is used for the main server port.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server.

variables.name: Direct Connect (No Steam Relay)
variables.description: Allow direct connection via IP+Port without Steam relay (0=Steam relay enabled, 1=Direct IP connection enabled). When enabled, players can connect directly to the server IP and port instead of using Steam relay.

variables.name: Server Admins (JSON)
variables.description: Admin users configuration. Paste your JSON array directly. Format: [{"SteamId": "76561198...", "Claims": ["kick", "ban", "restart"], "Name": "AdminName"}]. This updates users/config.json automatically on server start.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Optional Steam game server token passed as +net_game_server_token.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatic server updates. Currently not working at runtime; image rebuild is required.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch name used for updates (for example: staging).

variables.name: Enable Update Checker
variables.description: Enable background update monitoring for dedicated server updates (1=enabled, 0=disabled). When update is detected, initiates graceful shutdown.

variables.name: Update Check Interval (seconds)
variables.description: How often to check for updates (default 3600 = 1 hour). Minimum 60 seconds.

variables.name: Shutdown Warning Timer (seconds)
variables.description: How long to warn players before update shutdown (default 120 = 2 minutes). Minimum 15 seconds.

variables.name: Shutdown Warning Message
variables.description: Message sent via 'say' command during countdown. Use [TIME] as placeholder for remaining seconds (e.g., 'Server updating in [TIME] seconds').
variables.default_value: Server will restart for updates in [TIME] seconds

variables.name: Final Warning Message (Last 15s)
variables.description: Message sent via 'say' command during final 15 seconds before shutdown. This overrides the regular message.
variables.default_value: Server restarting in 15 seconds for updates!

variables.name: Windows .NET Version
variables.description: Informational only: Windows .NET runtime version baked into the container image.
